_comment: Entry-screen greeting templates, selected by market-clock window (see market_calendar.json). `templates` contain the {clientRef} placeholder so the client can render the customer's first name in its own accent styling — the backend never sends a fully rendered greeting. `fallbackTemplates` are used when no first name is available and contain NO placeholder, so the rendered line has no double space or dangling punctuation. DEFAULT must render byte-identically to the pre-existing static greeting.

templates.MORNING: Good morning, {clientRef} ☀️ What can I get for you?
templates.MARKET: Hi {clientRef} — markets are live. Need a report or a quick answer?
templates.POST_MARKET: Hi {clientRef} 👋 Markets are closed — I'm not.
templates.MUHURAT: Happy Diwali, {clientRef} 🪔 Muhurat trading is live — need anything?

fallbackTemplates.DEFAULT: Hey there — what do you need?
fallbackTemplates.MORNING: Good morning ☀️ What can I get for you?
fallbackTemplates.MARKET: Markets are live. Need a report or a quick answer?
fallbackTemplates.MUHURAT: Happy Diwali 🪔 Muhurat trading is live — need anything?
